requirement_topic.en: EMC behavior, labeling, and CE interpretive use
requirement_topic.zh: EMC行为、标识与CE的解释性使用
requirement_topic.zht: EMC行為、標識與CE的解釋性使用

summary.en: For UAE-bound electrical products including power banks, EMC evidence is reviewed against UAE.S/GSO-aligned expectations, and CE marking is typically treated as supporting evidence rather than a direct legal mark of UAE equivalence. Importer and project stakeholders may request class-of-environment and declaration text alignment before release.
summary.zh: 面向阿联酋的电子产品（含移动电源）通常按UAE.S/GSO采用的EMC预期进行复核，CE标志多被视为支持性证据而非阿联酋法定义务等同标志。进口商和项目方通常会要求环境类别与声明文本对齐后才能放行。
summary.zht: 面向阿聯酋的電子產品（含行動電源）通常按UAE.S/GSO採納的EMC預期進行複核，CE標誌多被視為支援性證據而非阿聯酋法定同等標誌。進口商與項目方通常要求環境類別與聲明文本對齊後才放行。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S and GSO references linked to IEC 61000 emissions/immunity behavior
Project or importer-level EMC requirement checks at destination

summary.en: China-side documents often use domestic EMC bases such as GB standards and supplier test reports. These can be reused only if mapped to UAE environmental assumptions and importer review language, because CE-style declarations may still need destination translation and evidence completion.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常使用GB体系和供应商测试报告。若要在阿联酋使用，需映射到阿联酋环境假设与进口方审核语言，因为CE风格声明仍可能需要目的地语言转换与证据补充。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常使用GB體系和供應商測試報告。若要在阿聯酋使用，需映射到阿聯酋環境假設與進口方審核語言，因為CE風格聲明仍可能需要目的地語言轉換與證據補充。

standards_or_laws: CNCA EMC declarations for electrical imports

gap.en: The gap is usually scope translation at the product-model and channel level, not a complete replacement of the underlying test method. CE documentation should be converted into a UAE-facing compliance matrix before submission.
gap.zh: 差距通常发生在产品型号和通道层面的范围转换，而非试验方法本身完全更替。CE资料应转换为面向阿联酋的合规对照矩阵后再提交。
gap.zht: 差距通常發生在產品型號和渠道層面的範圍轉換，而非試驗方法本身全部更換。CE資料應轉為面向阿聯酋的合規對照矩陣後再提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for models where destination logistics or project specification routes require EMC evidence and importer-facing declaration controls, with destination scope driving the applicable set.
mandatory_status.cn: Domestic CN EMC documentation is mandatory where Chinese export rules require it, but not an automatic UAE legal substitute.

source.publisher: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat CE as equivalent-by-default; use it as partial evidence after route-and-model mapping to UAE/GSO expectations and destination declaration formats.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应默认将CE视为等同认可文件，应先完成UAE/GSO路由及型号映射后，按目的地声明格式作为补强证据使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應預設將CE視為等同認可文件，應先完成UAE/GSO路由與型號映射後，按目的地聲明格式作為補強證據使用。
